testcase.name: p04_serviceAllOptionsSelectable

failure.message: The following asserts failed: P04-1: Exception selecting service 'Social Media Management': element not interactable (Session info: chrome=146.0.7680.75) Build info: version: '4.20.0', revision: '866c76ca80' System info: os.name: 'Linux', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '6.8.0-106-generic', java.version: '11.0.30' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: 146.0.7680.75, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify,
